title: Supabase Schema Sync Check

transitions.note: Add pg-based schema sync check for Supabase tables/columns.
typecheck, lint, build, docs:check passed. schema:check exits 2 here (no SUPABASE_DB_URL); run against the real DB to validate schema.

notes: schema:check needs SUPABASE_DB_URL + network, so it is NOT in verify/CI/build and is not part of checksRequired. It cannot be run to green in this environment (no DB credentials, and real connection strings must not be added). Known drift: models.status is not in current migrations.
